title: Disney DCPRCIN03 Cinderella Child Dress Costume - 3-6 Months
features: Package includes: 1 Cindrella Dress; 1 Headband - fits to infant 3 -6 months
Features a pretty blue dress with layered skirt trimmed, puffed sleeves, white ribbons, delicate flowers, and embroidered Cinderella's name
Perfect for Halloween, trick or treat, costume parties, themed parties, dress-ups, birthdays, special events or in Disney Princess themed party
Transform your child into cute little princess with this Cinderella costume
description: Product Description Transform your child into cute little cinderella with this cinderella dress. Featuring a gorgeous blue dress trimmed with pretty bows and flowers. Includes headband and bloomers. Safety Warning No warning applicable Box Contains 1 xDress See more
